session.summary: TODO Cleanup — resolved all 5 open Codex TODOs. Fixed renderStorageUsage to scan all codex-* keys (was missing draft/seed/migration keys). Added deleted apocrypha to trash view with restore + permanent delete. Added canon_updates to snippet pipeline (preview + import). Reconciled QUICK_REFERENCE docs (font tokens, KEYS, routes, store API, snippet format, build phases). canon-0009 superseded via canon_updates.
session.handoff: All 5 TODOs resolved. Mark TODOs as resolved in-app. Next: SproutLab Today So Far build, Codex SproutLab chapter backfill.

chapter.name: TODO Cleanup
